{{CargoOrgan
|name=Chainblades
|type=Bionic
|rank=purple
|id=10670
|idx=27
|description="A frigid, razor-edged chainblade gleaming with primal lethality. It severs all obstacles without mercy, heralding annihilation."
—Skynet Surveillance Log
|skill=Activate Chain Sword Mode, dealing DMG equal to 163% of ATK!
|hp=1170
|def=152
|atk=204
|rush=157
|gene1=Per purple or higher organ equipped, {race} ATK +20
Purple or higher Organs equipped: 7/7
|gene2=In Fissure combat, Wind DMG +120
|gene3=Earth DMG +60
|gene4=Ignore Earth RES +60
|gene7=Earth DMG +180 (Awakened)
|}}
